title: Lord Sheraton Leather Shine 300ml
features: • Enhance The Natural Beauty Of Wood & Leather.
• For intensive care or restoration, use Lord Sheraton Leather Balsam. With pure beeswax and blended oils, it deeply cleans and nourishes leather to leave long lasting shine and protection.
description: Product Description Lord Sheraton Leather Shine 300ml - 2044417 Ingredients This Product Contains Amongst Other Ingredients:, 30% And More Aliphatic Hydrocarbons, Perfumes, This Product Contains No Nut Derived Ingredients, Its Perfrumes Contain Benzaldehyde (Artificial Almond Oil) Safety Warning DIRECTIONS. Shake well. Spray about 15cm (6 inches) from the surface. Wipe immediately with a clean, soft cloth. For small areas, spray directly onto cloth and polish as usual. Leather Shine may be used safely on leather and synthetic leather. If you are not certain that your leather is suitable, test on an inconspicuous area first. DO NOT USE ON SUEDE OR NUBUCK. SOLVENT ABUSE CAN KILL INSTANTLY. EXTREMELY FLAMMABLE. Use only as directed. Use only in well ventilated areas. CAUTION: Do not pierce or burn even after use. Do not spray on or near a naked flame or any incandescent material. Manufacturer Contact Information 2Nd Floor, Betchworth House 57/65 Station Road Redhill Rh1 1Dl See more
